title: Registered Nurse - Medicine Unit
description: Alberta Health Services is hiring a Registered Nurse for the medicine unit at Foothills Medical Centre. Full-time position with rotating shifts. You will provide direct patient care, collaborate with a multidisciplinary team, and support patient education. BScN and active CRNA registration required.

title: Software Developer, Payments Platform
description: Join a growing Calgary fintech building payment infrastructure for Canadian credit unions. You will work with TypeScript, PostgreSQL and AWS. Hybrid schedule, 3 days in the Beltline office. 3+ years experience shipping production web services required.

title: Casino Dealer
description: Deal blackjack and poker at a busy casino on the Calgary Trail. Evening and weekend availability required.

title: Heavy Equipment Technician
description: Finning Canada is seeking a certified Heavy Equipment Technician for our Calgary branch. Diagnose, service and repair Caterpillar equipment. Journeyperson certification or 4th year apprentice standing required. Tool allowance, RRSP matching, and overtime available.

title: Barista - Downtown Location
description: Independent coffee shop on Stephen Avenue looking for an experienced barista. Latte art skills a plus. Morning availability required, no evening shifts.

title: Elementary School Teacher
description: Edmonton Public Schools is hiring elementary teachers for the 2026-27 school year. Alberta teaching certificate required. Positions available across the city with full benefits and pension.

title: Warehouse Associate - Nisku
description: Distribution centre in Nisku seeking warehouse associates for day and afternoon shifts. Forklift certification an asset but training provided. Steel-toed boots required. Weekly pay and shift premiums.

title: Bartender - Whyte Ave Nightclub
description: High-volume nightclub on Whyte Avenue hiring bartenders for weekend nights. ProServe required.

title: Accounts Payable Clerk
description: Established Edmonton construction firm seeks an accounts payable clerk. Process vendor invoices, reconcile statements, and support month-end close. 2+ years AP experience and strong Excel skills required. Hybrid after probation.
